_meta.description: D6 fixtures for strands / declarative-hashbrown. The dedicated /byoc-hashbrown StrandsAgent (src/agents/byoc_hashbrown.py) emits the hashbrown UI-kit JSON envelope { ui: [ { <tag>: { props } }, ... ] } consumed by @hashbrownai/react's useUiKit + useJsonParser in the demo renderer (hashbrown-renderer.tsx). Chart `data` props are JSON-encoded STRINGS so the schema stays stable under partial streaming. Keyed on the exact suggestion-pill prompts (declarative-hashbrown/suggestions.ts) so each pill replays deterministically. These supersede the legacy byoc.json render_dashboard/{metrics,charts} shape, which the dedicated hashbrown renderer cannot parse.

fixtures._comment: Sales dashboard pill — full hashbrown envelope: total-revenue metric + pie chart of revenue by segment + bar chart of monthly revenue. Renders [data-testid=metric-card] + [data-testid=pie-chart] + [data-testid=bar-chart].

match.userMessage: Show me a Q4 sales dashboard. Include a total-revenue metric card, a pie chart of revenue by segment, and a bar chart of monthly revenue.

fixtures._comment: Revenue by category pill — pie chart with 4 segments plus a heading metric.

match.userMessage: Break down Q4 revenue by product category as a pie chart. Include at least four segments with realistic sample values.

fixtures._comment: Expense trend pill — bar chart with one bar per month over six months plus a heading metric.

match.userMessage: Show me monthly operating expenses for the last six months as a bar chart with one bar per month.
